subcodes.first_line: Mention of thee hath come before the Wronged One, and the Most Holy, Most Exalted Tablet was sent forth. God willing, in all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت از قبل لدی المظلوم مذکور آمد و لوح امنع اقدس ارسال شد انشاء الله در جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @predictions and prophecies, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
